nodes.name: rule.md
nodes.summary: Vietnamese-language editing rules and quick-reference glossary for Chinese-to-Vietnamese novel translation editing. Covers 6 correctness principles (caution, grammar adjustments, pronoun/address forms, Quick Translator distrust, Han-Viet vs pure Vietnamese word balance, educated guessing) and 5 quality principles (flexible synonyms, learning from good edits, rewording over machine trust, conscious title/quote translation, clean formatting). Includes a 14-row glossary table and a 7-item editor checklist.
nodes.languageNotes: Written entirely in Vietnamese. References Quick Translator tool extensively. Contains pm-task frontmatter metadata for task tracking.

nodes.name: source.md
nodes.summary: Curated directory of Chinese web novel sources for translators and editors, organized into three sections: (I) raw Chinese text sources including qidian.com, novel.feiku.com, wenku.com, 17k.com, tieba.baidu.com and 30+ aggregator sites; (II) pre-converted Vietnamese text sources from tangthuvien.vn, diendanlequydon.com, and WordPress blogs; (III) Quick Translate (QT) software download sources. Includes a VIP-content workaround note advising Google search by Chinese title.
nodes.languageNotes: Written entirely in Vietnamese. Contains pm-task frontmatter with status=done. References the novel2epub crawling system as related project.

nodes.name: tool.md
nodes.summary: Step-by-step Vietnamese tutorial on using Quick Translator for Chinese novel conversion (convert) — the traditional non-AI workflow. Explains the convert concept, required prerequisites (NET Framework 3.5, Chinese fonts), and detailed usage of four tools: QuickTranslator (clipboard-based single-chapter convert with Han-Viet, Vietphrase, and dictionary views), QuickConverter (batch file conversion with 6 output formats), QuickAnalyzer, and QuickVietPhraseMerger. Emphasizes the importance of maintaining Name.txt and Vietphrase.txt data files as the core of quality output.
nodes.languageNotes: Written entirely in Vietnamese. Contains pm-task frontmatter with status=todo. References the novel2epub AI translate project.

edges.label: rule.md references Quick Translator throughout all editing principles; tool.md explains how to use Quick Translator
tool.md mentions sourcing txt files from sites like qidian and zongheng; source.md catalogs those sites
Both reference the traditional convert/edit workflow ecosystem; source.md provides inputs, rule.md governs output quality
